heading: Establishment: purpose
label: 9481 Establishment: purpose
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)941110:442 (words before 1st semicolon of 1st sentence).(words before 1st semicolon of 1st sentence); added , subch. I, § 34 (words before 1st semicolon of 1st sentence of last par.), .June 3, 1916, ch. 134, § 47dJune 4, 1920, ch. 22741 Stat. 779The words “upon military reservations or elsewhere” are omitted as surplusage. The words “of the Air Force” are inserted for clarity. The words “or enlistment as” are inserted for clarity.

Amendments2023— inserted dash after “to qualify them for” and par. (1) designation before “appointment”, substituted “; or” for “or the Space Force Reserve.”, and added par. (2).Pub. L. 118–312021—, inserted “or the Space Force Reserve” after “the Air Force Reserve”.Pub. L. 116–283, § 923(d)(16)(B), which directed amendment of this section by inserting “, the Space Force,” after “members of the Air Force,”, was executed by making the insertion after “members of the Air Force” to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 116–283, § 923(d)(16)(A)2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 9411 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.text: appointment as reserve officers, or enlistment as reserve noncommissioned officers, for service in the Air Force Reserve; or
appointment as officers, or enlistment as noncommissioned officers, for service in the Space Force in a space force active status.
